chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P No. D-31 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 19-02-2026 Mr. Gulshan R. Dayo, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant A.G a/w S.I.P Abdul Razaque Chandio, S.H.O P.S. Rasheed Waggan, S.I.P Rahab Ali, S.I.O and S.I.P Ali Dost Chandio on behalf of S.S.P Larkana. Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The respondents No.2, 3 and 4 have filed their respective comments, which are taken on record. Mr. Zeb Hussain Pathan, Advocate, has filed his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5 to 7, which is also taken on record. Through the instant constitutional petition, the petitioners have sought quashment of proceedings arising out of FIR No.01 of 2026, registered at Police Station Rasheed Wagan, for offences punishable under Sections 365-B and 34, P.P.C. The Investigating Officer of Crime No.01 of 2026, in his comments, has submitted that petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Son Pari, appeared before the learned I- Civil Judge/Judicial Magistrate, Larkana, and supported the version of the FIR. He has further stated that her statement has been recorded before the learned Magistrate in accordance with law, and a copy thereof has been produced along with his comments. In view of the above factual position, whereby petitioner No.1 herself has appeared before the learned Magistrate and supported the prosecution case, no further order is required to be passed in the present petition. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is disposed of. The petitioner No.2, if so advised, shall be at liberty to avail any remedy available to him under the law, before the competent forum, strictly in accordance with law.

Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is disposed of. The petitioner No.2, if so advised, shall be at liberty to avail any remedy available to him under the law, before the competent forum, strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE
